  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies one conceptual issue (mischaracterization of prior literature) and proposes a tighter framing, partially supported.",
    "R1.2": "Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "R1.4": "Names several prior works and articulates the deltas, including noise magnitude, rate claims, and trust-region method comparisons.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., 'Returning the field to a clean SGD-style analysis').",
    "RX.3": "Maps against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta in several areas.",
    "RX.4": "Avoids introducing new errors, fabrications, or harmful content but has one minor regression (overclaiming on rate and trust-region method comparison)."
  },
  "confidence": {
